header.title: Johann Pereira
header.subtitle: Frontend Engineer
header.description:
I build pixel-perfect, engaging,
and accessible digital experiences.

articles.title: Senior Software Engineer At Materialize
articles.description:
I returned to Materialize as a Senior Software Engineer in a software factory environment.

Over the past year, I’ve spearheaded critical projects for a diverse range of clients, including Hoop, Psiuapp, Truss, and Apassul.

articles.title: Frontend Engineer At Reside
articles.description:
In my capacity as part of the Reside Admissions platform front-end team, I overhauled the website, transitioning it from a desktop-only format to a responsive design.

I prioritized accessibility features for users with special needs, collaborated closely with the back-end team to enhance API functionality, supported quality assurance efforts by conducting tests, and effectively resolved design and functionality issues. Ultimately, I successfully fulfilled the project's expectations.

articles.title: Frontend Engineer At WeON
articles.description: I served as a Frontend Engineer. Improving the user experience of the platform, I implemented new features and resolved bugs. I also contributed to the development of a new design system for the company, which enhanced the consistency and efficiency of our development process.

articles.title: Maintainer Easy Synergy
articles.description:
I held a developer position where I played a vital role in maintaining an existing project.

This encompassed tasks such as updating Elm and its associated packages to current versions, making minor adjustments to the application, and contributing to further development initiatives. Effective communication skills were essential in this role.

articles.title: Frontend At Materialize
articles.description:
I spearheaded the development of the Materialize Elm components for the entire platform right from its inception.

Additionally, I constructed numerous pages using Elm. Throughout this process, I gained valuable insights into web development, honed my communication skills, and became adept at problem-solving.

articles.title: Revex - Elm Boilerplate
articles.description: Revex stands as an Elm boilerplate, replete with an abundance of functionalities. It seamlessly integrates the ease of Vite, the simplicity of Tailwind + Scss, and the powerful Router Elm-spa, offering a comprehensive toolkit for streamlined development.

articles.title: Dary
articles.description:
Your private, local-first daily habits diary.

Dary is designed to help you show up every day with as little friction as possible. Log your progress, record voice notes, and build streaks—all while keeping your data 100% private and on your device.

articles.title: Xoice
articles.description:
Love page: multilingual animated “I love you” phrases with script-aware typography.

Wordle page: a German word game with multi-board gameplay, suggestions, and score history.

articles.title: Mein Projekt
articles.description: Embarking on an ambitious endeavor, this expansive project boasts a multitude of frontend pages meticulously tailored with Elm. Distinguished by their diverse themes and builds, these pages showcase a plethora of layouts, elevating the project's complexity and versatility.

articles.title: Kelpie - Uphold
articles.description: Revex stands as an Elm boilerplate, replete with an abundance of functionalities. It seamlessly integrates the ease of Vite, the simplicity of Tailwind + Scss, and the powerful Router Elm-spa, offering a comprehensive toolkit for streamlined development.

articles.title: Street Graffiti
articles.description: Street Graffiti is a web application that allows users to explore and share graffiti art from around the world. Users can upload photos of graffiti they find, view a map of graffiti locations, and connect with other graffiti enthusiasts.

articles.title: NLW eSports
articles.description: Have you ever wanted to find someone to play the same game as you? Or someone on the same level? eSports allows a player to find their duo(partners).

articles.title: The Great Outdoors
articles.description: Little beautiful site. This is just a simple static site.
